summary: All four critical issues fixed. (1) toolResponseStyle wired: ToolCallCard now imports useSettings() and initialises the expanded signal to defaultExpanded() which is true when settings().ui.toolResponseStyle === 'detailed'. (2) pushSettingsToCore() expanded: now logs all relevant generation/agentLimits fields (reasoningEffort, maxTurns, temperature) and documents that per-run values are applied via SubmitGoalArgs in submit_goal — there is no standalone Tauri IPC command to push these to AgentStack outside of a run, so they flow correctly at run-time already. (3) YOLO/bypass fixed: PermissionsTab.modes array now only lists ['ask', 'auto-approve'] (removing 'bypass' from the segmented control), and the applyPreset('yolo') handler now sets permissionMode to 'auto-approve' instead of 'bypass', matching what the Rust backend's parse_level() accepts. modeLabels still covers all three PermissionMode values for backward compat. (4) Base URL input wired: provider-card-expanded.tsx now holds a local baseUrl signal, wires onInput to update it, and calls props.onSaveBaseUrl?.(baseUrl()) on blur. The onSaveBaseUrl prop is threaded up through ProviderCard -> ProvidersTabGrid -> ProvidersTab -> SettingsModalContent where it calls onUpdateProvider(id, { baseUrl: url || undefined }).
